name: RescheduleEngineer
description: Customer wants to reschedule, rearrange, or move an existing engineer visit, technician appointment, or installation appointment to a different date or time — the appointment already exists and they need to change when it happens. This is not cancelling the appointment or booking a new one.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to reschedule my {engineerVisitType}
Can I move my engineer appointment to a different date?
Rearrange my {engineerVisitType} please
How do I change the date of my {engineerVisitType} ?
I can't make the date booked for my {engineerVisitType} — can I change it?
Something has come up and I need to move my engineer visit
Is it possible to reschedule my {engineerVisitType} to next week?
I need my {engineerVisitType} moved to a later date
Can I bring my {engineerVisitType} forward?
Are there any earlier dates available for my {engineerVisitType} ?
The engineer was supposed to come today but I need to rearrange
I won't be home on the day of my {engineerVisitType} — can we rebook?
Move my {engineerVisitType} to a different time slot
I need to postpone my engineer appointment
Can you change my {engineerVisitType} to a weekend?
My {engineerVisitType} clashes with something else — can I move it?
I was told the engineer is coming on the wrong day — can you fix this?
Push my {engineerVisitType} back by a few days
Is there a morning slot available instead for my {engineerVisitType} ?
I need to change when the engineer is coming
The date you've given me for the {engineerVisitType} doesn't work
reschedule engineer
